xcode.note: Registers Xcode's built-in MCP bridge for external Codex sessions. Users still need Xcode installed, Xcode > Settings > Intelligence > Model Context Protocol enabled, and an open project in Xcode for the bridge to provide project-specific tools.

xcode_lldb.note: Registers Xcode's LLDB MCP server when the selected Xcode toolchain provides `xcrun lldb-mcp`. This is experimental for Xcode 27 beta-era debugging workflows; verify startup against the installed Xcode before relying on it.
